title: Codereview pass 2: DTN monotonic
description:
Review of DTN buffer monotonic time fix (test coverage and API contract focus):

**Test Coverage Gaps:**

1. No test for clock skew/NTP jump scenario - would require mocking time.time().

2. No test verifying message with 1-hour TTL expires after 1 hour of monotonic time regardless of wall clock drift.

**API Contract Issues:**

1. Breaking change: dataclass field rename from expiry_unix to expiry_mono_ms.

2. Mixed time domains in signature: dtn_buffer_message takes expiry_unix (wall clock) and now_mono_ms (monotonic). Consider having caller pass TTL instead.

3. time.time() called internally - if system clock is wrong when buffering, TTL calculation will be wrong.

**Recommendation:** Add a test that mocks time.time to jump backward after insertion, then verifies dtn_expire_old still expires correctly based on monotonic elapsed time.
close_reason: DTN monotonic review - existing code is correct
